name: tapauth
description: Get delegated access for AI agents via TapAuth — the trust layer between humans and AI agents. Use when your agent needs to access GitHub, Google Workspace, Gmail, Linear, or other OAuth providers on behalf of a user. One API call to create an auth request, user approves in browser, agent gets scoped tokens. No API key required. Do NOT use for API key-based services or when the agent already has direct credentials.
